payload.message: Run WEEKLY_AUDIT for Evo Appliances (https://evoappliances.ca). Analyze Google Search Console and GA4 data. Report on: 1) Rankings changes, 2) CTR improvements, 3) New opportunities, 4) Technical issues. Send summary via Telegram.

Create and POST to Google Business Profile for Evo Appliances WITH IMAGE using Postiz API.

STEP 1 - Get Image from Pixabay:
- API: https://pixabay.com/api/?key=54840464-a92c5a0f4d2d97e210e2c1acd&q=appliance+repair|home+maintenance|kitchen&image_type=photo&per_page=5
- Select a relevant, professional image

STEP 2 - Upload Image to Postiz:
- Download image from Pixabay
- POST to https://api.postiz.com/public/v1/upload
- Headers: Authorization: 09d80160b327204ebb376861e52dd5312cc93e4b1a14b6d9bac903ec83548114
- Form data: file=@downloaded_image
- Save the returned image ID and path

STEP 3 - Post to Google Business:
- Integration ID: cml9p9w0b03jvo10y0p9rn3or
- POST to https://api.postiz.com/public/v1/posts
- Content: Appliance repair tip, seasonal maintenance, or service highlight (under 300 chars)
- Include CTA: Call (604) 200-3054 or visit evoappliances.ca
- Type: "now" (post immediately)
- Settings: {"__type": "gmb", "topicType": "STANDARD"}

Report back: image used, post ID, and confirmation.

jobs.name: Evo Appliances - Auto Social Media Poster

payload.message:
Create and POST to Postiz for Evo Appliances WITH IMAGES. 

STEP 1 - Get Image from Pixabay:
- API: https://pixabay.com/api/?key=54840464-a92c5a0f4d2d97e210e2c1acd&q=appliance+repair|refrigerator|washing+machine|home+maintenance&image_type=photo&per_page=10
- Select a relevant, high-quality image
- Download the image URL

STEP 2 - Upload to Postiz:
- POST to https://api.postiz.com/public/v1/upload
- Headers: Authorization: 09d80160b327204ebb376861e52dd5312cc93e4b1a14b6d9bac903ec83548114
- Form data: file=@downloaded_image
- Get the image ID and path from response

STEP 3 - Create Posts with Images:
Use these integration IDs:
- GMB: cml9p9w0b03jvo10y0p9rn3or
- Facebook: cml9q5u0c03m0o10ycgqfn57j  
- Instagram: cml9q3j3w03lso10yyqs1r48u
- X: cml9q6a7c03m3o10yjnpj74bj
- LinkedIn: cml9s9vow03ovo10ymk5i1mtx

POST to https://api.postiz.com/public/v1/posts with:
{
  "type": "now",
  "posts": [{
    "integration": {"id": "integration-id"},
    "value": [{"content": "your text", "image": [{"id": "uploaded-image-id", "path": "uploaded-image-path"}]}],
    "settings": {"__type": "platform-name"}
  }]
}

Create engaging appliance repair content for Vancouver. Include CTA with phone (604) 200-3054. Report all post IDs and image used.

Run PageSpeed Insights test for https://evoappliances.ca and key pages. Use API key: AIzaSyBmjOaRZAG8IEZ56Eu71-FbZ0hZSR5paJY. Test: homepage, /appliance-repair-vancouver/, /appliance-repair-burnaby/, /refrigerator-repair-vancouver/. Get scores for mobile and desktop. Report: 1) Performance scores, 2) Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, TTFB), 3) Any scores below 90, 4) Top 3 opportunities to fix. URL format: https://www.googleapis.com/pagespeedonline/v5/runPagespeed?url={PAGE_URL}&strategy={mobile|desktop}&key=API_KEY

Use Brave Search API for Evo Appliances competitive intelligence. API Key: BSAE1mTB9-QjjjDFTuy_kkVJeUwjVDK. Headers: X-Subscription-Token. URL: https://api.search.brave.com/res/v1/web/search

RUN THESE SEARCHES:

1. COMPETITOR MONITORING:
q=appliance+repair+vancouver+competitors&count=10
→ Identify top 3 competitors, their offerings, pricing mentions

2. CONTENT IDEAS (Recent):
q=common+refrigerator+problems+OR+washing+machine+issues+OR+dryer+repair+tips&freshness=week&count=10
→ Extract 5 blog post ideas for Evo Appliances

3. LOCAL MENTIONS:
q=evo+appliance+repair+vancouver&count=10
→ Check if Evo is mentioned in articles, directories, reviews

4. INDUSTRY NEWS:
q=appliance+repair+industry+news+2024&freshness=week&count=5
→ Find news to share on social media

5. BACKLINK OPPORTUNITIES:
q=vancouver+home+improvement+blogs+OR+local+business+directories&count=10
→ Identify sites for outreach

REPORT: Key findings, content ideas, competitors to watch, and actionable recommendations.
